question: ¿Cuál es la forma correcta de ejecutar una transacción con múltiples operaciones en MySQL usando Python?

options.text: try: cursor.execute("INSERT INTO tabla1 VALUES (1, 'a')") cursor.execute("UPDATE tabla2 SET col = 'valor' WHERE id = 1") conexion.commit() except: conexion.rollback()
cursor.begin_transaction() cursor.execute("INSERT INTO tabla1 VALUES (1, 'a')") cursor.execute("UPDATE tabla2 SET col = 'valor' WHERE id = 1") cursor.end_transaction()
with conexion.transaction(): cursor.execute("INSERT INTO tabla1 VALUES (1, 'a')") cursor.execute("UPDATE tabla2 SET col = 'valor' WHERE id = 1")
cursor.execute("BEGIN TRANSACTION") cursor.execute("INSERT INTO tabla1 VALUES (1, 'a')") cursor.execute("UPDATE tabla2 SET col = 'valor' WHERE id = 1") cursor.execute("COMMIT")
